Connect, Discover and Trade Carbon-Negative NFTs on Hedera!

Discover the thrill of the digital art world at your fingertips, powered by the Hedera Hashgraph Network, with fixed fees, immutable royalties and scalable transactions.

Maintain complete autonomy over your NFTs and tokens! Our platform ensures that all listings and transactions are conducted in a non-custodial manner, prioritizing control and security of your NFTs and Tokens.

Discover HBAR NFTs with Ultra-Fast Non-Custodial Transactions and Exceptionally Low Gas Fees on the Hedera Hashgraph Network.

Connect your wallet

You can choose between Hashpack, Blade Wallet, or Wallet Connect

Read More

Browse our Marketplace

Collect, trade, and explore a diverse array of HBAR NFTs, and discover the top trending NFTs.

Read More

Manage your NFTs

Quickly bulk list, modify, sell or modify your owned NFTs. Access your settings and profile.

Read More

Get NFT Insights

Track HBAR NFT Daily Volume Stats: Visit Our Analytics Page for Comprehensive Insights

Read More

Whether you're a seasoned collector or new to the realm of NFTs, our marketplace is your gateway to a vibrant and ever-evolving universe of digital creativity and innovation. Begin your journey with us and immerse yourself in a world where art meets technology.

Explore what's hot right now in the HBAR NFT Ecosystem:

The SentX API for Developers

Are you a developer and interested in integrating the sentx.io market engine into your own app or site? We have a beta api endpoint that is free to use. What can you do with it?

  • List new nfts and/or buy existing NFTs on our market directly from your site/app, and earn your commission from trade fees (affiliate endpoint)
  • Get real time stats about market listings, activity, collection info, nfts, floor, historic data and more (public reporting endpoint)

Find the docs at api.sentx.io/api-docs/ and generate your API Key from your settings

Reach out on Discord (https://discord.gg/SwkF4YGzKK) if you need any help!

SentX Labs provides free open APIs for to the Hedera Ecosystem and is committed to Open Source
